answer:
\boxed{Delphine}

Rastignac becomes attracted to **Delphine**, the elder daughter of Jean-Joachim Goriot, after she shows interest in him and he extracts money from his own family to impress her. Their connection is marked by her upper-class lifestyle and his ambition to enter high society. Delphine later becomes his romantic and social ally, though their relationship is complicated by her husband’s control and her own selfishness.
